extraction.one_line_summary: POGAČAR won with a late sprint after chasing down HIRSCHI's long-range move, while ROGLIČ took yellow jersey by finishing in same group 21 seconds ahead of BERNAL.
tactical_patterns: HIRSCHI rode entire category-one climb solo from breakaway then contested sprint, nearly stealing stage despite dead legs from effort.
JUMBO-VISMA controlled peloton tempo to protect ROGLIČ without attacking, forcing chasers to bridge to HIRSCHI and surrender sprint advantage.
MARTÍNEZ attacked mid-climb for stage win despite losing GC time earlier, revealing EF pivoted individual riders to stage hunting.
PINOT dropped early on climb then recovered to peloton, signaling inconsistent form rather than complete collapse.

rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: closed time gap from mechanical losses by attacking for stage win, moved to 7th at 44 seconds
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: took yellow with 21-second advantage without needing to attack, JUMBO controlled pace consistently
rider_signals.HIRSCHI Marc: positive: soloed category-one climb from breakaway and nearly won sprint despite exhaustion, exceptional strength
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: negative: dropped from yellow to 2nd at 21 seconds, lost time on final kilometers without responding
rider_signals.YATES Adam: negative: lost yellow jersey, dropped to 8th at 1:02 after suffering badly in final 2km of climb
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: negative: dropped early then recovered but clearly not 100 percent, bad back issues persisting
rider_signals.MARTÍNEZ Daniel Felipe: neutral: attacked mid-climb for stage but absorbed, showing legs for opportunities not GC
rider_signals.PORTE Richie: positive: moved up to 11th overall with strong ride, form improving into second week
rider_signals.MOLLEMA Bauke: neutral: present in chase group behind stage winner, consistent positioning
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: neutral: animated in final kilometer but unable to contest sprint effectively
